Experience
Software Engineer II | Razorpay | Bengaluru, India
Jul 2022 - Present
- Re-architected the settlement reconciliation pipeline in Go and Kafka, cutting end-of-day variance from 0.42% to 0.03% across 11 million daily transactions.
- Led the migration of 14 payment microservices from EC2 virtual machines to Kubernetes on EKS, reducing infrastructure spend by 18,000 USD per month.
- Designed an idempotency-key service handling 9K requests per second with p99 latency under 12ms.
- Mentored 3 interns; two converted to full-time offers.
Machine Learning Intern | Sprinklr | Gurugram, India
May 2021 - Jul 2021
- Fine-tuned a DistilBERT intent classifier on 2.3 million support tickets, lifting macro-F1 from 0.71 to 0.84.
- Shipped a Redis-backed feature cache that cut p95 inference latency from 310ms to 95ms.
Projects
RouteZero | Python, FastAPI, PostGIS, React | github.com/aaravm-dev/routezero
- Built a carbon-aware delivery routing engine serving 4K requests per day; reduced average route emissions 12% in a pilot with two logistics partners.
- Won second place among 240 teams at HackMIT 2021.
ChessVision | PyTorch, OpenCV, Flask | github.com/aaravm-dev/chessvision
- Trained a convolutional network that reconstructs board state from phone photos with 97.1% square-level accuracy; repository has 800+ stars.
